description: You are in a dimly lit room with an old wooden desk and a locked safe against the wall.

items.name: Desk key
items.description: An old brass key lying under the desk.

items.name: Main key
items.description: A sturdy key concealed in a hidden safe.

items.name: Safe
items.description: A large safe secured to the wall.

items.name: Piece of paper
items.description: A torn piece of paper with cryptic markings.

puzzles.name: Unlock the safe
puzzles.description: The safe requires a 4-digit PIN code to unlock.

puzzles.name: Decode!
puzzles.description: Decipher the markings on the torn paper to reveal a clue.
